name: Baked Lemon Haddock
tagline: Haddock baked under buttery lemon-garlic crumb
highlight: Crumb-topped white fish — pantry-easy, no shellfish

hero.alt: Baked haddock with golden crumb topping
hero.caption: haddock — lemon crumb

healthFacts: Haddock is mild and low-fat — almost identical nutritional profile to cod.
A crumb topping shields the fish from drying out.

steps.title: Make the crumb
steps.detail: Stir panko with melted butter, grated garlic, lemon zest, parsley, salt, pepper.
steps.tip: Crumb should clump when pressed — that means enough butter.

steps.title: Mustard and lemon
steps.detail: Place haddock in a buttered baking dish. Brush with Dijon and squeeze lemon juice over.
steps.tip: Dijon helps the crumb cling without flour or egg.

steps.title: Crumb-top
steps.detail: Press crumb onto each fillet, covering completely.
steps.tip: Use the back of a spoon to press — keeps it from falling off.

steps.title: Bake until gold
steps.detail: Bake at 400°F for 14 min until crumb is golden and fish flakes. Squeeze fresh lemon over.
steps.tip: If crumb browns too fast, tent with foil for the last few minutes.
